---
title: "README"
output: github_document
---

# City Flow: tracking movement through NYC using twitter data
Team Members: Ashe King, James McQuilken, Chimaera Todd, Ben Vales, Daniel Meyer

## Repository Structure
Folder Structure: 

Data
-Raw Data: Data gathered to be used/manipulated

-Derived Data: Data derived from manipulation of raw data
--Posts Per User:
--Classify local vs non-local: Filters raw Twitter data for coordinate-based posts (type == "ll") and classifies users as "local" or "non-local" based on whether their H3 home cell falls within the NYC borough boundaries</n>

Maps and Figures
--Code outputs that result in maps or figures such as graphs

## Abstract

## Methodology

## Analysis

## Conclusion
